preferred_name: revision counter value of the parameter setting

preferred_name_ml.en: revision counter value of the parameter setting

definition: value of the counter totalizing the storing of the parameter set of a device

definition_ml.en: value of the counter totalizing the storing of the parameter set of a device
definition_ml.de: Wert des Zählers, der die Speichervorgänge des Parametersatzes eines Geräts aufsummiert

note: Any reset of the device parameters will also increment the counter.

note_ml.en: Any reset of the device parameters will also increment the counter.
note_ml.de: Jeder Reset der Geräteparameter erhöht ebenfalls den Zähler.

remark: also used by Process Automation - Device Information Model (PA-DIM)

remark_ml.en: also used by Process Automation - Device Information Model (PA-DIM)
remark_ml.de: auch verwendet von Process Automation - Device Information Model (PA-DIM)
